subject: Re: WPH Corp funds
body:
yes

----- Original Message ----
From: Darren indyke <dkiesq@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com

Subject: FW: WPH Corp funds


Please advise.

-----Original Message-----
From: "Peg Ugland" <pegu@naproperty.com>
To: dKIESQ@aol.com
Sent: 5/14/2007 6:28 PM
Subject: WPH Corp funds

Is this OK?  Thanks.

Darren,

I need funds for WPH Corp in order to pay a Purdey invoice from Thunder 
Construction in the amount of $389,755.  Could I please transfer $750,000 
from the WPH Corp Bear Stearns account to the WPH Corp JPMorgan 
account.  The balances are as follows:
    * Bear Stearns            $1,017,329.55
    * Merrill Lynch           $1,251,305.00
    * JPMorgan                $   223,000.00
Thank you.

Peg
